bead.title: artifacts list: /artifacts page with search, filter chips, URL state, pagination
bead.description:
Build the artifact browser list page at /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/artifacts.

- Category filter chips from mediaType enum (text/markdown, image/svg+xml, image/*, application/pdf, application/vnd.excalidraw+json, unknown)
- Full-text search bar (client-side across title + path)
- URL encodes active filter + search: ?mediaType=...&q=...
- Relay cursor pagination with load-more button
- Row click navigates to /artifacts/:artifactId
- Staleness badge per row (fresh/stale indicator from Artifact.staleness)
- Update /documents route to redirect to /artifacts?mediaType=text%2Fmarkdown
- NavShell nav tab: Artifacts (replaces Documents in primary tab set)

Depends on ddx-ccbf6172 (artifacts backend).
bead.acceptance:
1. /artifacts renders artifact list with category chips and search bar.
2. Clicking a chip filters by mediaType; URL updates; reload restores filter.
3. Typing in search bar filters list client-side; URL updates.
4. Load-more button appears when hasNextPage=true; clicking loads next page and appends rows.
5. Each row shows staleness badge (fresh=green, stale=amber, missing=red).
6. /documents redirects to /artifacts?mediaType=text%2Fmarkdown.
7. NavShell shows Artifacts tab; active tab highlights correctly.
